start_prompt: Send a SoundCloud or YouTube link.
start_legal_notice: Legal documents are available via the buttons below.
need_link: Please send a SoundCloud or YouTube link.
already_running: You already have a running job. Please wait.
invalid_link: Invalid link. Send a direct SoundCloud or YouTube URL.
button_not_for_you: This button is not for you.
stale_button_alert: This button is outdated. Send the link again.
stale_button_reply: This button is outdated. Send the link again.
invalid_range: Invalid range: end must be greater than start.
too_long: Content is too long ({hours} h). Maximum {max_hours} h.
file_too_big:
The file is too large for Telegram. Download link:
{link}
file_send_fallback_link:
Telegram did not accept the file in time. Here is a download link:
{link}
file_send_fail: Couldn't send file to chat. Try again later.
generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
stalled_note: Network stall detected, stopping the job...
err_stale_button: Button is outdated. Send the link again.
legal_docs_unavailable: Public legal documents are not configured yet. Please contact support.
legal_specific_unavailable: This document has not been published yet. Please contact support.
metadata_prompt_intro: Do you want to edit audio metadata?
metadata_enter_title: Enter a new title or press "Back".
metadata_enter_artist: Enter a new artist or press "Back".
metadata_need_changes: Change at least one field first.
metadata_done_once: Done. This edited file cannot be requested again.
metadata_session_expired: Metadata edit session expired (1 hour). Send the link again.
admin_private_only: Critical operations are allowed only in a private chat with the bot.
admin_nonce_not_for_you: This confirmation is not for you.
admin_broadcast_prompt: Send one message for the broadcast: text, photo, or photo with caption. Use /cancel to abort.
admin_broadcast_preview: Received. This exact message will be broadcast. Confirm sending to all users?
admin_broadcast_expired: Broadcast draft not found. Start again with /admin_broadcast.
admin_broadcast_unsupported: Only text and photos are supported. Send text, a photo, or a photo with caption.
faq_text:
FAQ:
1) Requests are unlimited.
2) Maximum media duration is 3 hours.
3) After an mp3 is delivered, you can edit title/artist.
4) Metadata edit session TTL is 1 hour from the last action.
rules_text:
Usage rules:
Requests: unlimited.
Maximum media duration: {max_hours} h.
MP3 metadata editing: available.
admin_help:
Admin commands:
/admin_profile [user_id]
/admin_ads
/admin_ad_add button_text | url | advertiser | erid | text
/admin_ad_on ad_id
/admin_ad_off ad_id
/admin_ad_delete ad_id
/admin_ad_send ad_id
/admin_broadcast
/admin_setrole user_id user|admin|superadmin [reason]
admin_ad_add_usage: Usage: /admin_ad_add button_text | https://example.com | advertiser | erid | text
admin_ad_send_disabled: Ad is disabled. Enable it with /admin_ad_on before sending.
